title: Clinical Treatment Recommendation KG
schema_name: Clinical Mental-Health Treatment-Recommendation KG — Depth-First Tree Graph
fusion_method: deterministic Version 0.3 semantic-edge revision: All former IS_A relations were replaced by explicit, domain-meaningful KG predicates. Depth is represented through compositional and operational relations (for example HAS_COMPONENT, USES_TECHNIQUE, MEASURES, TARGETS, MAINTAINS, MODIFIES, and REQUIRES_MONITORING), while cross-branch relations encode clinically relevant dependencies, treatment logic, contextual constraints, and cultural-spiritual adaptations. Predicate-vocabulary compaction: repeated branch-specific predicates were consolidated into reusable semantic relations such as HAS_COMPONENT, HAS_MANIFESTATION, HAS_MODALITY, HAS_THERAPY_APPROACH, USES_TECHNIQUE, MODIFIES, TARGETS, MAINTAINS, INFORMS, and REQUIRES_MONITORING. This preserves graph meaning while reducing predicate redundancy. Predicate-vocabulary compaction: repeated branch-specific predicates were consolidated into reusable semantic relations such as HAS_COMPONENT, HAS_MANIFESTATION, HAS_MODALITY, HAS_THERAPY_APPROACH, USES_TECHNIQUE, MODIFIES, TARGETS, MAINTAINS, INFORMS, and REQUIRES_MONITORING. This preserves graph meaning while reducing predicate redundancy.

Single reusable symptom branch. It replaces parallel classes such as symptom cluster, symptom feature, thought, behaviour, and functional complaint. Extraction guidance: Attach presence, severity, frequency, duration, onset, context, quote, and source confidence to ClinicalCase→Symptom. Do not create a separate symptom-observation node. Constraints: Severity, duration, frequency, and uncertainty are edge attributes—not new sibling types. A child exists only when it carries a distinct clinical meaning, intervention target, or guideline role. Each symptom uses one canonical parent path during extraction.

Single reusable therapeutic-action branch. It replaces parallel classes such as treatment, intervention, therapeutic technique, CBT technique, and therapy method. Extraction guidance: Extract the deepest available leaf. The ancestor path retains modality → model → component → exact technique. Constraints: Use HAS_COMPONENT to assemble a multi-technique intervention; do not create duplicate hybrid nodes. Medication monitoring, contraindication, and treatment burden link to the intervention or action, not to a duplicate treatment class. Cultural and faith-sensitive details remain by reference in the companion KG.
